{{Quote|When the Imperials blockade a planet, they scatter Defenders throughout the near space orbit of the world. It is nearly impossible to get through the blockade without encountering at least one of the mines.|General Airen Cracken|<ref name="CRFG" />}}
The '''Mark III Merr-Sonn Defender Ion Mine''',<ref name="SD">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Shintel Downtime|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> also known simply as the '''Defender ion mine''',was an automated [[Space mine/Legends|space mine]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CRFG" />

==Description==
Manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]], Defender ion mines were deployed into the [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]] of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] wanted to [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]]. [[Cloaking revver]]s and [[particle-beam scatter projector]]s worked to keep the mine invisible to [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. A cluster of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] rods enabled a Defender to detect nearby objects, though the mine would ignore anything less than four [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter. When a ship came within 10 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]], the mine would use its [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] to disable the vessel.<ref name="CRFG" /> After the target was incapacitated, the mine would send a transmission to its control station. A nearby customs vessel or other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] would then come to investigate. Defenders were nearly undetectable due to their small size and sensor countermeasures, making minefields containing Defender mines difficult to clear. Defenders were also used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the [[Imperial Remnant]], and planetary governments.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Empire [[Blockade of Berason|blockaded]] the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world of [[Berason]] with Defenders due to its political stance. A low tech world, it relied on trade for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] and medical supplies. As the blockade went on, the people of Berason began to become ill, weakening their resolve to stand against the Empire. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] led a relief mission to get supplies to the planet, which meant getting through the mine field. Using [[Environment suit/Legends|vacc-suits]] and [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]], Cracken deployed men to clear a path through the Defenders large enough for the convoy.<ref name="CRFG" />

When [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] fled into the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] after being [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|ousted]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], he stopped at the planet [[Shintel]] to take on supplies and personnel. When Sarne left, he stranded the remaining forces on the planet by destroying their [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] capable ships and [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and seeding Defender ion mines in orbit. A portion of the minefield was eventually cleared by the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''.<ref name="SD" />
